TEMPLAR TO TAKE PLACE IN CALIFORNIA. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA MILLER; NOT REPORTED.

Off Calendar Dec-28-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. JOHN D. GARVIC OF GARVIC & ASSOCIATES, TEL. NO. (650) 342-0873 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. JASON M. SKAGGS, TEL. NO. (650) 617-3226 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT MODIFIED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS:
PLAINTIFF JEFFREY BRUGOS' Motion For An Order Requiring Defendant Trevor Templar To Attend His Deposition Until Completed And For Sanctions IS Granted. Defendant must complete his deposition testimony by February 17, 2012. Sanctions of $5,100.00 are awarded to Plaintiff and are to be paid by February 3, 2012. The deposition of Mr. Templar to take place in California. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Marla Miller; Not reported. = (302/MJM))
